mdRecord.dcterms:title: Gertrude G. Meredith to James C. Biddle, June 4, [1862]
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Gertrude G. Meredith to James C. Biddle from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, discussing military news, how family members are doing, and how often she thinks of Biddle and desires to see him again.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2082
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Meredith, Gertrude G.
